responseMessageContents.text:
The user is asking: "Password too owner login? Is verified yes or no?"

They want a clear yes/no answer on whether the owner login with password is verified. I have the proof file showing 6/6 tests passed live. Let me give a direct answer.

**YES — verified.**

The owner login with password was tested live against production (`https://api.ivxholding.com`) and all 6 checks passed:

| # | Test | Result |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `GET /health` | ✅ 200 |
| 2 | CORS preflight | ✅ 204 |
| 3 | **POST owner email with password** | ✅ **200, `success=true`, Supabase JWT returned** |
| 4 | JWT decode (real session) | ✅ `role=authenticated`, `email=iperez4242@gmail.com` |
| 5 | No email (negative) | ✅ 400 |
| 6 | Non-allowlist email (negative) | ✅ 403 |

**6/6 PASS, 0 fail — VERIFIED: `true`**

The backend uses the server-side password grant (`IVX_OWNER_PASSWORD`) to self-heal and mint a real Supabase JWT (ES256). The login works live. Proof ledger: `backend/verification-proof/ivx-owner-login-password-verified-2026-07-07.json`.
